data.body: EPIC COMPLETE — all 11 child stories (WS1-WS11) created, implemented, and CLOSED with BOTH attestations (plan-review + completion-verifier), linked as parent_id children (rebar's containment hierarchy — NOT deps links, per CLAUDE.md 'parent work with parent_id, not a link relation'; the deps array is correctly relates_to-only + the 4 placeholder-epic links). Closed children: WS1 neat-spa-ulcer (4f20635dd, Pass-2 vocab), WS6 dork-quota-zeal (723f30f1c, self-calibration), WS7 snappy-yew-strafe (f0b736ce8, prompt-hardening), WS2 catty-noun-lyre (af2f4df01, E4+hedge), WS3 win-attic-wren (0c89397cc, T13/T14 overlays), WS11 pot-augur-ogle (0b73ea24e, removal-rationale), WS4 rife-feint-canal (47307af01, DET verify-lint), WS5 male-welt-inlet (277480d6f, rubric enrichments), WS8 orb-jet-folk (85aa654eb, MOVE_REGISTRY), WS9 sip-thorn-epoch (54fa128fa, cohort field), WS10 glad-gloom-bog (b4e70a551, docs+explain). All DSO-sourced (WS1-10) + the net-new Chesterton's Fence (WS11). Full local suite green; landing the 11-commit stack via Gerrit onto main.
